summary: Created `src/signals/device-signals.ts` with a pure `collectDeviceCapabilitySignals()` function and `DeviceCapabilitySignals` interface. Collects screen dimensions, device pixel ratio, hardware concurrency, touch support, and storage support (localStorage, sessionStorage, indexedDB) using feature detection with `'unavailable'` fallbacks for missing APIs. Fixed `tests/tsconfig.json` rootDir to allow imports from `src/`. All tests (69), lint, and typecheck pass.
